channel.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories
channel.description: Top stories in the U.S. and world news, politics, health, science, business, music, arts and culture. Nonprofit journalism with a mission. This is NPR.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

image.title: NPR Topics: Home Page Top Stories

item.title: ICE shared Medicaid data it wasn't supposed to have with Palantir
item.description: The revelations came out in a federal court case brought by Democratic states challenging ICE's access to Medicaid data to aid in deportation efforts.
item.content:encoded:
The revelations came out in a federal court case brought by Democratic states challenging ICE's access to Medicaid data to aid in deportation efforts.

(Image credit: Adam Gray)
item.dc:creator: Jude Joffe-Block

item.title: Ex-wife says ICE agent who killed man in Maine had racist beliefs, violent tendencies
item.description: Ashley Brouillette has identified her ex-husband, David Brouillette, as the officer who fatally shot Joan Sebastián Durán Guerrero in Biddeford, Maine, on Monday. She said she learned he was the officer responsible when he called her on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded:
Ashley Brouillette has identified her ex-husband, David Brouillette, as the officer who fatally shot Joan Sebastián Durán Guerrero in Biddeford, Maine, on Monday. She said she learned he was the officer responsible when he called her on Wednesday.

(Image credit: Yuki Iwamura)
item.dc:creator: Vanessa Romo

item.title: Spain could make World Cup history: The first to win men's and women's trophies back-to-back
item.description: The Spanish Men's National Team will face Argentina in Sunday's World Cup final. The country's women's team lifted its first World Cup trophy in 2023.
item.content:encoded:
The Spanish Men's National Team will face Argentina in Sunday's World Cup final. The country's women's team lifted its first World Cup trophy in 2023.

(Image credit: Florencia Tan Jun)
item.dc:creator: Madeline Fox

item.title: Move over, Super Bowl? There's an even bigger – and splashier – World Cup halftime show coming
item.description: The show, which will begin somewhere around 3:45 PM ET, will air in the U.S. on Fox, Fox One and in Spanish on Telemundo, as well as on the Fox Sports app and streaming in Spanish on Peacock. It's expected to run for about 11 minutes.
item.content:encoded:
The show, which will begin somewhere around 3:45 PM ET, will air in the U.S. on Fox, Fox One and in Spanish on Telemundo, as well as on the Fox Sports app and streaming in Spanish on Peacock. It's expected to run for about 11 minutes.

(Image credit: Charly Triballeau)
item.dc:creator: Anastasia Tsioulcas

item.title: China signals possible return of U.S. trade privileges for Hong Kong
item.description: The decision comes two months after President Donald Trump met with Xi Jinping, potentially warming ties ahead of Xi's expected U.S. visit.
item.content:encoded:
The decision comes two months after President Donald Trump met with Xi Jinping, potentially warming ties ahead of Xi's expected U.S. visit.

(Image credit: Mark Schiefelbein)
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press

item.title: The new $1 Trump coin doesn't just buck norms. Experts say it also breaks laws
item.description: President Trump's face will appear on a new commemorative coin honoring the nation's 250th birthday. It's one of the many unusual places his likeness has popped up this year.
item.content:encoded:
President Trump's face will appear on a new commemorative coin honoring the nation's 250th birthday. It's one of the many unusual places his likeness has popped up this year.

(Image credit: AP)
item.dc:creator: Rachel Treisman

item.title: Iceberg lettuce at Taco Bell linked to cyclospora outbreak in 5 states
item.description: Federal health officials have identified a single supplier of the produce from Mexico that was served in Taco Bell restaurants in five states.
item.content:encoded:
Federal health officials have identified a single supplier of the produce from Mexico that was served in Taco Bell restaurants in five states.

(Image credit: Mario Tama)
item.dc:creator: Allison Aubrey

item.title: The U.S.-Iran battle over the Strait of Hormuz raises risks for global waterways
item.description: Recognizing Iran's control over the Strait of Hormuz could set a dangerous precedent, with other countries attempting to claim important waterways, analysts say.
item.content:encoded:
Recognizing Iran's control over the Strait of Hormuz could set a dangerous precedent, with other countries attempting to claim important waterways, analysts say.

(Image credit: AFP via Getty Images)
item.dc:creator: Jackie Northam

item.title: Wildfire smoke is like smoking 'half a pack a day.' Here's how to protect yourself
item.description: As Canadian wildfires spread smoke across the U.S. the air pollution is dangerous to health. But there are ways to protect yourself. Here's what to know.
item.content:encoded:
As Canadian wildfires spread smoke across the U.S. the air pollution is dangerous to health. But there are ways to protect yourself. Here's what to know.

(Image credit: Scott Olson)
item.dc:creator: Alejandra Borunda

item.title: Is smoke in your home? Here's how to make an air purifier using a box fan
item.description: Smoke from wildfires in Canada and Minnesota is sending air quality indexes to record levels, posing a hazard for millions of people. Here are tips for how to breathe easier in your home.
item.content:encoded:
Smoke from wildfires in Canada and Minnesota is sending air quality indexes to record levels, posing a hazard for millions of people. Here are tips for how to breathe easier in your home.

(Image credit: Finn Gomez)
item.dc:creator: Bill Chappell
